scenarios.description: clone() produces a deep copy: modifying clone's child elements does not affect the original
scenarios.precondition: original Document has an appended Element child
scenarios.expectedResult: clone is distinct; original.childNodes unaffected by mutations to clone.childNodes
pseudocode: // original still has its header and no footer

scenarios.description: clone() preserves quirksMode and location fields, and clone.quirksMode changes do not affect original
scenarios.precondition: original Document with non-default quirksMode set
scenarios.expectedResult: clone has same quirksMode and location; changing clone.quirksMode does not mutate original
pseudocode: TEST TC04 quirksMode and location copy
// clone got original quirksMode and location
// changing clone does not affect original
